title.en: Prentis, new AI lab co-founded by Reid Hoffman, Marc Pincus in talks to raise $100M
title.zh: 由 Reid Hoffman 和 Marc Pincus 共同创立的新人工智能实验室 Prentis 正在洽谈融资 1 亿美元

summary.en: The neolab is betting that automating routine computer tasks will soon outpace coding as AI's biggest use case.
summary.zh: Neolab 坚信，日常计算机任务的自动化将很快超过编码，成为人工智能最大的用例。

title.en: Canadian legislator reads out apparent LLM response in floor speech
title.zh: 加拿大立法者在发言中宣读了法学硕士的明显回应

summary.en: "Here’s a more natural, flowing version of that section..."
summary.zh: “这是该部分的更自然、流畅的版本……”

title.en: Midjourney bought the astrology app Co-Star
title.zh: Midjourney 购买了占星应用程序 Co-Star

summary.en: Midjourney, which has gone from generating AI cat images to full-body ultrasound scans, is getting into a new field: astrology. The AI startup announced on Thursday that it has ac…
summary.zh: Midjourney 已经从生成 AI 猫图像到全身超声波扫描，正在进入一个新领域：占星术。这家人工智能初创公司周四宣布，它已经...

title.en: Why Cognition bought Poke: AI personality is becoming a competitive advantage
title.zh: Cognition为何收购Poke：AI个性正在成为竞争优势

summary.en: The acquisition brings Poke’s conversational style and interaction model to Cognition’s coding agent Devin, reflecting a growing belief that how AI assistants interact with users…
summary.zh: 此次收购将 Poke 的对话风格和交互模型带给 Cognition 的编码代理 Devin，反映出人们越来越相信 AI 助手如何与用户交互......

title.en: Team uses AlphaFold AI to redesign gene-editing proteins to make them safer
title.zh: 团队使用 AlphaFold AI 重新设计基因编辑蛋白质，使其更安全

summary.en: Google's AlphaFold can help ID what parts of a gene editing protein enable mistakes.
summary.zh: 谷歌的 AlphaFold 可以帮助识别基因编辑蛋白的哪些部分会导致错误。

title.en: AINTMA: Agentic AI Architecture for Autonomous Test Management with Generative Intelligence, Secure Cloud Communication and Adaptive Quality Analytics
title.zh: AINTMA：用于自主测试管理的代理人工智能架构，具有生成智能、安全云通信和自适应质量分析

summary.en: arXiv:2607.20452v1 Announce Type: new Abstract: Modern software quality assurance demands intelligent, autonomous systems capable of adaptive decision-making across distributed cl…
summary.zh: arXiv:2607.20452v1 公告类型：新 摘要：现代软件质量保证需要能够跨分布式集群进行自适应决策的智能、自主系统……

title.en: How AI helps scientists design the next generation of medicines
title.zh: 人工智能如何帮助科学家设计下一代药物

summary.en: Designing and developing a new medicine is an expensive, failure-prone scientific challenge. A new drug can take many years to develop, at the cost of a significant investment. An…
summary.zh: 设计和开发新药是一项昂贵且容易失败的科学挑战。一种新药的开发可能需要多年时间，并且需要大量投资。一个…

title.zh: 在 ChatGPT 中启动 Health

summary.en: Health in ChatGPT now lets eligible U.S. users securely connect medical records and Apple Health to get more personalized insights and better understand their health.
summary.zh: ChatGPT 中的健康现在可以让符合条件的美国用户安全地连接医疗记录和 Apple Health，以获得更个性化的见解并更好地了解他们的健康状况。

title.en: Accelerating the frontiers of scientific discovery: Google’s $40M commitment to the Genesis Mission
title.zh: 加速科学发现的前沿：Google 对创世纪任务的 4000 万美元承诺

summary.en: Google commits $40M in AI tokens and credits for the Genesis Mission
summary.zh: 谷歌承诺为创世任务投入 4000 万美元的人工智能代币和积分

title.en: Google just redesigned the search box for the first time in 25 years — here’s why it matters more than you think.
title.zh: Google 25 年来首次重新设计了搜索框——这就是为什么它比你想象的更重要。

summary.en: For a quarter century, the Google search box has been one of the most recognizable interfaces in computing: a thin white rectangle, a blinking cursor, a few typed words, and a lis…
summary.zh: 四分之一个世纪以来，谷歌搜索框一直是计算领域最知名的界面之一：一个细长的白色矩形、一个闪烁的光标、几个键入的单词和一个列表……
